last_session_summary: Implemented AST Builder v1: immutable AST node definitions in compiler/ast/nodes.py, CST-to-AST transformation in compiler/ast/builder.py. Discards syntax-only tokens (semicolons, commas, braces, parens). Preserves source spans on all AST nodes. Added 25 AST unit tests and golden snapshot. All quality gates pass (59 tests, black, ruff, mypy).
